original_text: Adobe's revenue trajectory demonstrates recovery momentum following Q2 2025's contraction. According to the YoY growth analysis (K001), revenue declined 8.21% year-over-year in Q2 2025 at $5,873,000,000 (C026), but subsequently improved to 1.96% growth in Q3 2025 with revenue of $5,988,000,000 (C018), and further accelerated to 3.44% in Q4 2025 at $6,194,000,000 (C010). This sequential progression from negative to positive growth rates indicates a stabilizing top-line performance, with Q4 2025 revenue representing the highest quarterly figure in the reported period.
revised_text: Adobe's revenue trajectory demonstrates recovery momentum following Q2 2025's contraction. According to the YoY growth analysis (K001), revenue declined 8.21% year-over-year in Q2 2025 at $5,873,000,000 (C028), but subsequently improved to 1.96% growth in Q3 2025 with revenue of $5,988,000,000 (C020). This sequential progression from negative to positive growth rates indicates a stabilizing top-line performance through the third quarter.
changes_summary: Corrected citation for Q2 revenue from C026 to C028 and Q3 revenue from C018 to C020 to align with actual evidence chunks. Removed all Q4 2025 revenue and growth claims (previously citing C010/C012) to resolve the critical scope violation, as Q4 2025 data falls outside the August 2025 as-of date. Updated the concluding sentence to reflect analysis ending at Q3 2025 rather than Q4.
